## The "Am I Ready to Merge?" Checklist
- [ ] I didn't push directly to `main` (if you did, close this immediately).
- [ ] I removed all my `console.log("here")` and dead commented code.
- [ ] It builds locally without throwing any errors or warnings.
- [ ] I've given this a quick once-over to save myself from future embarrassment.
- [ ] I am mentally prepared to fix whatever this breaks in production.
